description: Per-address tax registration detail for a supplier: the tax registration number and the state/region code (padded to two digits) for the jurisdiction that the address sits in. Decouples multi-registration suppliers (one supplier registered in several states/regions) from a single address so the correct registration and place-of-supply apply per transaction.

fields.name: supplierAddressId
fields.label: Supplier Address
fields.validation: set from the parent address; tax detail belongs to exactly one address; replaced as a set when the supplier/address is edited
fields.purpose: Binds the tax registration to a specific supplier address so the right registration number and region apply when that address is used as the bill-to/ship-from on a PO or invoice.

fields.name: taxRegistration
fields.label: Tax Registration Number
fields.validation: the jurisdiction tax registration identifier (GSTIN for India, VAT number for Oman, etc.); format per jurisdiction
fields.purpose: The jurisdiction-specific tax registration the supplier transacts under at this address, used on the PO/invoice for tax computation, input-credit eligibility, and statutory reporting.

fields.name: stateCode
fields.label: State / Tax Region Code
fields.validation: numeric state/region code zero-padded to 2 digits (e.g. 07); must agree with the address state and the leading 2 digits of the GSTIN
fields.purpose: The two-digit state/tax-region code that determines GST place-of-supply (intra- vs inter-state) and matches the first two digits of the GSTIN; padding to two digits keeps the code consistent for tax computation and reporting.

fields.name: taxRegion
fields.label: Tax Region
fields.validation: the tax region/jurisdiction name; region code padded to 2 digits where numeric
fields.purpose: Names the tax jurisdiction/region for the address so multi-region suppliers route to the correct tax treatment and reporting bucket; complements the numeric state code with a human-readable region.

invariants: A10 tax-detail set replaced wholesale on supplier/address edit
A13 audit (category SUPPLIER) + SSE on every change
A15 valid tax registration is part of the supplier compliance eligibility record
